title: NOD-MEG
description: The Natural Object Dataset (NOD) integrates magnetoencephalography (MEG) and electroencephalography (EEG) data collected from subjects viewing naturalistic stimuli consisting of diverse object images from ImageNet. This multimodal neuroimaging resource complements previously collected fMRI data from the same subjects and stimuli, enabling investigation of neural mechanisms underlying object recognition with both high spatial and temporal resolution across three complementary imaging modalities.
methods_description: MEG and EEG data were collected from subjects passively viewing naturalistic object images from ImageNet. Raw data are provided in BIDS format with preprocessing performed using MNE (version 1.7.1). Preprocessed data and epoch data are available in derivatives directories. Trial-level metadata including stimulus category information and subject responses are documented in detailed events files.

funding_references.funder_name: National Natural Science Foundation of China
